plugins.name: dhpk
plugins.description: Reusable Claude Code harness — 18 role-based agents (incl. the Swift/Xcode build-resolver and the silent-failure-hunter error-handling auditor), ~70 commands, ~50 core skills, 7-slot sentinel-driven review hooks (code/db/sec/frontend/doc/polyfill/migration), opt-in stack modules across PHP (5.6, 7.4, 8.x), Yii (1.1), PHPUnit (5.7, 9, 10, 11), Laravel (6–11), JS, the library-author cross-cutting module, and an iOS/Swift suite (swift, swiftui, ios-platform, swift-testing, xcode-tooling) with SwiftLint post-edit + xcodebuild/SPM pre-commit hooks. Wrapper-dispatch hook extension model, parallel Codex CLI tree.
